spec_match.rationale: Uses real auto and hint popovers, source-aware Popover API calls, a hint sourced from inside an auto, and an authored auto sourced from inside a hint to demonstrate the v149 effective-type downgrade.

interactive.rationale: The controls open, close, light-dismiss, and reset real popovers while state cards, event logs, and active chains update from platform events.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now includes the promised ancestor-chain diagram and active chain readout beside the sandbox.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers sibling auto/hint coexistence, hint-inside-auto, authored-auto-inside-hint downgrade behavior, unrelated auto dismissal, unrelated hint branching, outside light-dismiss, and warns when an older Chromium build may still show pre-v149 dismissal.

design_system.rationale: Styles use the shared CSS variables, local button background overrides also set color, and the concept remains a live interactive surface rather than a static card.

summary: Rebuilt Stack Sandbox around a visible ancestor-chain tree, source-aware nested popover controls, live state cards, event logging, an outside-click light-dismiss pad, and a pre-v149/v149 behavior table. The previous open questions are addressed in this concept.
